creator: ormandj@gmail.com
text:
When I start X on this machine using the ati driver, I get a garbled background. If I bring up menus, they appear fine (but do not disappear, they stay as part of the background.) urxvt I see a title bar, but no terminal itself. Various video issues like this. Same thing with external display. In vesa mode, it works fine (but I can't use an external monitor - big problem.)

How can I resolve this? Attaching xorg.conf and log.
